text: HARTING Product Change Notification NOR 0603/03 PCN Business Unit: Electronics PCN/22/021/C+N Product range: Board Connectors / DIN Power Date: 2022-11-21 Author: Marius Hepermann Title: DIN Power type F female - optimization of insulation body for WW + solder lugs - External Details of Product Changes 1. Concerned part number (see also attachment): DIN Power type F female WW + solder lugs  please see attached excel-sheet 2.
